title: tragacantha helmii
intro: Tragacantha helmii, also known as the Helminthoglossum helmii, is a rare and endangered plant species in the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha helmii include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the removal of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
